data.title: MEG Energy evacuates workers due to Alberta wildfire threat
data.description:
MEG Energy (OTCPK:MEGEF) said Friday it evacuated all non-essential workers from its Christina Lake production facility in northern Alberta due to active wildfires in the area.

The company said it has not curtailed its oil production at the site, which is 150 km south of the Fort McMurray oil sands hub.

Wildfires burning in the oil-producing province of Alberta are threatening ~5% of Canada's crude output and have affected the operations of several companies this week, including Cenovus Energy (NYSE:CVE), which said on Wednesday it was reducing non-essential workers at its Foster Creek facility as a precaution.

Canadian Natural Resources (CNQ) said operations are “steady” at its Kirby oil sands site, which is farther from the blaze.

data.title: CoStar Group and Happening settle dispute
data.description:
• CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) and Happening Technology have resolved their legal dispute, with all claims withdrawn with prejudice.
  • The matter stemmed from concerns over potential trade secret misuse following the launch of Happening by former Homesnap executives.
  • A thorough review found no misappropriation or legal violations by Happening or its founders.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: EnviroGold appoints interim CFO
data.description:
• EnviroGold Global has named Peter Nguyen as interim chief financial officer, effective immediately.
  • Nguyen succeeds Kyle Appleby, who resigned effective May 20, 2025.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: Wetouch Technology receives Nasdaq notice for late filings
data.description:
• Wetouch Technology (NASDAQ:WETH) received a Nasdaq notice on May 27, 2025, for failing to file its quarterly and annual reports on time. The company is not in compliance with Nasdaq.
  • Wetouch has until June 20, 2025, to submit a compliance plan to Nasdaq.
  • If accepted, Nasdaq may grant an extension until October 13, 2025, to file both reports.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: Oak Woods Acquisition receives Nasdaq notice for late quarterly filing
data.description:
• Oak Woods Acquisition (NASDAQ:OAKU) received a Nasdaq notice on May 27, 2025, for failing to file its quarterly on time.
  • The company is not in compliance with Nasdaq.
  • Oak Woods has 60 days to submit a compliance plan to Nasdaq.
  • If accepted, Nasdaq may grant an extension until November 17, 2025, to regain compliance.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: Interfield Global announces board changes
data.description:
• Interfield Global Software (OTCPK:IFSSF) announced the resignations of Steele Hemmerich and Crae Garrett as directors, effective May 30, 2025.
  • Hemmerich will continue to serve as the company’s chief executive officer.
  • The changes are part of ongoing restructuring tied to a joint venture with Abhi Fintech Ltd.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: Closed runway at Newark Liberty International Airport to open ahead of schedule
data.description:
Runway 4L-22R at Newark Liberty International Airport could be open as soon as next week, nearly two weeks ahead of schedule, the Port Authority of New York and New Jersey announced on Friday.

The 11,000-foot runway has been closed since mid-April for a scheduled $121M upgrade for repaving, to improve lighting and drainage, and update airfield signs. While the runway was closed, the airport relied on only two other runways, one of which cannot be used under adverse wind conditions. The closure compounded existing delays at the airport and exacerbated ongoing disruptions caused by air traffic control issues over the past month.

Airport runways are typically repaved every 10 years. Newark’s other main runway, 4R-22L was last rehabilitated in 2021.

“As other issues have arisen related to Newark Liberty’s capacity, the Port Authority took on the challenge to speed up the construction,” said Port Authority Executive Director Rick Cotton.  

Added Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy, “As we approach the busy summer travel season, this key milestone puts us on a path to further reducing congestion, enhancing safety, and ensuring a seamless travel experience. With the runway completed, we’ll continue our work to harden the telecoms infrastructure and improving the staffing pipeline for the airspace.”

Related tickers: United Airlines (NASDAQ:UAL), Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL), American Airlines (NASDAQ:AAL), Alaska Air Group (NYSE:ALK), JetBlue Airways (NASDAQ:JBLU), Allegiant Air (NASDAQ:ALGT), Frontier Group Holdings (NASDAQ:ULCC), Spirit Aviation Holdings (NYSE:FLYY), Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV)

data.title: High Wire Networks announces reverse stock split
data.description:
• High Wire Networks (OTCQB:HWNI) announced that its board of directors has determined to effect a one-for-250 reverse stock split of the company’s common stock, par value $0.0001 per share.
  • The reverse stock split will take effect at market open on Monday June, 2, 2025 on the OTCQB market.
  • The reverse stock will reduce the number of outstanding shares of common stock from approximately 251.15M million shares to approximately 1.004M million shares.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Kymera jumps 16% as it prepares to release phase 1 data on inflammatory diseases asset
data.description:
Kymera Therapeutics (NASDAQ:KYMR) rose ~16% in after-hours trading Friday after the company announced it would release phase 1 data of its inflammatory diseases oral candidate KT-621 in healthy patients on June 2.

The biotech said that KT-621 is a potential first-in-class, oral degrader of STAT6, the transcription factor responsible for IL-4/IL-13 signaling and the primary driver of Th2 inflammation.

"STAT6 degradation has the potential to provide the convenience of an oral medicine with the potential for biologics-like activity and in doing so reach broader patient populations compared to injectable biologics or other standards of care," Kymera said in a news release.

The company noted that in preclinical studies, KT-621 demonstrated activity similar to that seen with Regeneron Pharmaceuticals' (NASDAQ:REGN)/Sanofi's (NASDAQ:SNY) Dupixent (dupilumab) in in vitro and in vivo models. Dupixent is an IL-4 receptor alpha antagonist.

The candidate is currently in a phase 1b trial in atopic dermatitis. Data is expected in Q4. Two parallel Phase 2b clinical trials in moderate to severe atopic dermatitis and asthma are expected to start, respectively, in Q4 and 2026 Q1.

data.title: 9F Inc. receives Nasdaq non-compliance notice
data.description:
• 9F Inc. (NASDAQ:JFU) received a Nasdaq notice on May 23, 2025, for failing to file its 2024 annual report on time.
  • The company is not in compliance with Nasdaq.
  • 9F has 60 days to submit a compliance plan to Nasdaq.
  • If accepted, Nasdaq may grant an extension until November 11, 2025, to regain compliance.
  • Source: Press release
